title: Runbook Automation Definition
description: Schema readiness for runbook automation definitions, covering runbook steps, conditionals, variable substitution, and execution logging.

fields.name: runbook_step_schema
fields.purpose: Schema defining runbook step structure and sequencing

fields.name: conditional_branching_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for conditional logic and branching within runbooks

fields.name: variable_substitution_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for template variable substitution in runbook steps

fields.name: runbook_execution_log_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for logging runbook execution history and outcomes

fields.name: runbook_parameter_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for runbook input parameters and default values

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real runbook execution, no automated step dispatch, no conditional execution. Runbook automation remains non-functional.
